title: Multilingual entity labels via ontology cross-refs
context: Multilingual entity labels (drawn from CC0 ontology cross-references where available) widen accessibility without inventing labels. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Add multilingual entity labels via ontology cross-references, using CC0 labels where available and never fabricating translations.
acceptanceCriteria: Multilingual labels are sourced from ontology cross-references (CC0 labels where available); provenance recorded.
No labels are fabricated; entities without an available label remain unlabeled (gaps stay gaps).
output: A multilingual entity-label dataset (CC0 cross-refs), committed via PR.
